summary: The tender is primarily structured around providing personnel resources with a time and materials pricing model, capped at a not-to-exceed (NTE) price.
primary_evidence: T&M Services (up to an NTE Price)
proposed Labour Rates for the applicable SFIA skillsets
actual time spent by the Supplier’s Personnel
secondary_indicators: Supplier’s Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of: Time and Materials (T&M)
reasoning: The tender documents consistently emphasize the provision of personnel resources with a focus on time and materials billing, capped at a not-to-exceed price. The use of labour rates and the requirement for timesheets further support the classification as staff augmentation time and materials.
